title: How AI could help doctors find lung cancer earlier - and save more lives
description: Artificial intelligence is showing promise as a tool for detecting lung cancer nodules that even trained radiologists can miss, according to researchers in Cleveland.
content:
CLEVELAND, Ohio (InvestigateTV) — Artificial intelligence is showing promise as a tool for detecting lung cancer nodules that even trained radiologists can miss, according to researchers studying the technology at University Hospitals in Cleveland.

title: Let's keep artificial intelligence inside prisons and out of classrooms: Here's why
description: Asia’s rush to put AI in classrooms is driven as much by fear and profit as by progress. But what if this technology is harming children? AI is more likely to show positive educational results in other settings—such as skilling prison inmates for jobs.
content: You don’t have to be a Luddite to see the problem: AI’s inherent promise is convenience, while learning requires effort. Those aims are fundamentally at odds. The technology does not belong in elementary school classrooms, and the later students enco... [4256 chars]

title: AI users split into three groups as gap widens

title: UT leads Tennessee's artificial intelligence future
description: Our campuses are ensuring the benefits of artificial intelligence reach all 95 counties, writes UT System President Randy Boyd.
content:
Is the University of Tennessee System doing enough around artificial intelligence (AI)? I get that question a lot. The question isn’t whether Tennessee will be affected by AI. It’s whether we will lead.
The answer is yes.

title: Amazon’s India-born quick commerce model goes global: Jefferies sees 25% order growth
description: The brokerage, citing CEO Andy Jassy’s shareholder letter and investor interactions, said delivery speed is emerging as a key priority alongside artificial intelligence, even as the company continues to invest heavily across both areas.
content: Amazon was one of the first companies to enter the e-commerce segment years ago. Now, with the quick commerce segment gaining ground, Amazon is in an attempt to step up its push on faster deliveries with its quick commerce model, which was first test... [2635 chars]

title: SoftBank creates new company building ‘physical AI.’
description:
It wants to make an AI model that can autonomously control machines and robots by 2030, Nikkei reports. The project, part of SoftBank’s robotics push, has buy-in from domestic giants including Sony, Honda, and Nippon Steel. It comes as countries increasingly encourage sovereign AI efforts to compete with US and Chinese firms.
[Link: Japan's SoftBank launches unit to develop homegrown AI | https://asia.nikkei.com/business/technology/artificial-intelligence/japan-s-softbank-launches-unit-to-develop-homegrown-ai | Nikkei Asia]

title: Chinese AI solves decade-old maths problem in hours, with no human intervention
description: A Chinese artificial intelligence framework has autonomously resolved an open problem proposed more than a decade ago by a US mathematician, according to the Peking University-led team that developed it.
content:
